opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on pullbacks into 400-425 that hold above 385 (gap midpoint); add on any retest of 405-410 with volume confirmation on the daily chart.
opportunities.rationale: Micron gapped +14% on Mar 18 earnings (prev close ~370 to 441+ open), confirming a massive Q2 FY2026 beat driven by HBM AI demand. The gap retraced from a 461 peak to 422 by Mar 20, holding well above the gap base at 370. Gap follow-through protocol: price held above 50% of gap for 2+ sessions. Susquehanna PT $525 implies 24% further upside from current levels. R:R from midpoint 412 is 1:2.3 to 475 target. Invalidated below 385 (gap fill below 50% level).

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on pullbacks toward 195-199 that hold above 185; target 225 (prior resistance zone and 200-day MA area).
opportunities.rationale: Accenture gapped +4.3% on Mar 19 earnings (195.15 to 203.55), confirming Q2 FY2026 results met or beat expectations with continued AI consulting bookings momentum. Price consolidated at 199.99 through Mar 20, holding the gap base. The enterprise IT spending bellwether signal is constructive for the broader tech sector. Regime headwind (high vol, VIX 26.78) caps conviction at MODERATE. R:R from midpoint 199 is 1:1.86 to 225. Invalidated below 185 (pre-earnings swing low).

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on stabilisation in the 147-153 range with daily RSI resetting below 40; this is a re-entry on the Mar 10 earnings gap that has pulled back to a stronger support zone.
opportunities.rationale: Oracle gapped ~9-10% higher on Mar 10 after beating Q3 FY26 with strong cloud infrastructure growth and $130B remaining performance obligations. The stock ran to 155+ but has retraced to 149.68 on broad market weakness (VIX 26.78), creating a second-chance entry at better risk-reward. The cloud re-rating thesis (OCI revenue growth 50%+ YoY) remains intact. R:R from midpoint 150 is 1:2.0 to the 170 target. Invalidated below 140 (approaching full gap fill from 138 pre-earnings close).

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter only on stabilisation above 118 for 2 consecutive sessions with RSI below 30; this is a contrarian mean-reversion trade from a sharp post-earnings sell-off.
opportunities.rationale: Alibaba gapped -7.1% on Mar 19 earnings (134 to 125), continuing to 122 by Mar 20. The sell-off appears driven by China macro deceleration fears and EM sentiment drag from Iran conflict rather than structural impairment of the core business. LOW conviction: regime is hostile (high vol, Extreme Fear, downtrend) and direction conflicts with bearish EM bias. EP6 (regime alignment) fails, forcing LOW. Speculative 1% position only. R:R from midpoint 121 is 1:1.89 to 138. Invalidated below 112.
